prompt: The honesty gate must self-test green (contradicts/classify/verdict logic correct).
The run-journal must init, advance, and resume a wave correctly.
The kernel sandbox must block an out-of-scope write.
Every declared CI-layer gate must be present in a workflow (no ghost gate).
A comparison/decision question must route to an adversarial debate; a mechanical task must not.
The cost-ledger must total daily spend in integer cents, alert at 80%, block at 100%, and flag a whole-batch retry that re-bills succeeded items.
